method: HTTP Range-GET of the safetensors HEADER only (first 8 bytes = header length, then the JSON header). No weight bytes downloaded. Bounded-streaming path proven on the real official source.
verdict: Q0 PASS - official Qwen3-235B source is byte-readable and layout-verified against the config via bounded Range-GET; heavy shard-serial streaming is feasible. Q1/Q2 (bounded tensor decode + router/expert forward) run after the 120B seal + adapter tests.
storage_note: No weights resident; 0 disk consumed beyond metadata. Full transfer still gated by the one-parent storage law (120B source release or shard-serial stream).
